rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours And Companys Person Most Knowledgeable-Custodian Of Records And Production Of Documents And Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 10, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the further deposition of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours and Company¿s person most knowledgeable-custodian of records was continued by the parties. If all issues have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on May 9 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on May 10. = (220/HEK)
